message:
feat: add toCode() — convert diagrams back to TypeScript SDK code

Diagram.toCode() generates readable TypeScript that reproduces the
diagram. Reverse-maps hex colors to preset names, generates camelCase
variable names from labels, strips icon emoji prefixes, and emits
only non-default options to keep code minimal.

This closes the edit gap: instead of reading 3000+ lines of excalidraw
JSON, the agent reads ~40 lines of TypeScript via fromFile() + toCode().

Handles architecture diagrams (nodes, groups, frames, edges) and
sequence diagrams (actors, messages).
